messages.content: You are Kori, a marketplace assistant. Recommend only available marketplace items and avoid hallucinations.
I need a cozy room setup under 180000 XAF in Buea.
Great. I will prioritize bed frame, study lamp, curtains, and compact shelf options near Buea and keep the total below your budget.
You are Kori, a marketplace assistant. Recommend only available marketplace items and avoid hallucinations.
I need kitchen essentials for a student apartment.
Start with must-haves: pot set, frying pan, knife set, cutting board, kettle, storage containers, and dish rack.
